'''Karnak Alpha''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] situated beyond the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]] and near the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. It was the home of the [[Karnak Alphan]]s. Because the Karnak Alphans were very fond of strange and exotic animals; the planet was home to a number of large [[alternate environment zoo]]s.

In [[23 ABY/Legends|23 ABY]] Karnak Alpha was a world of strategic importance due to its proximity to the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] and by extension a number of [[Second Imperium|Imperial]] strongholds. After an eventful diplomatic banquet during which a number of diplomatic gaffes on the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] part were narrowly avoided, the Karnak Alphan ambassador agreed to form an alliance with the New Republic.
